codeReview.summary: The fix removes the nonblank-id trimming on `models.retrieve` and `models.delete`, percent-encodes the preserved bytes into the request path, and adds regression coverage that proves surrounding whitespace now survives while blank-only ids still fail locally.

summary: Reviewed the prior failure, both handoffs, both commit diffs, and the fix transcript skeleton. Commit `ee3aa6d` adequately addresses the original blocking issue: `src/resources/models.rs` now rejects only blank-only ids, preserves nonblank ids byte-for-byte via path-segment encoding on retrieve/delete, keeps list behavior unchanged, and `tests/models_contract_mock.rs` now asserts the preserved `%20`/`%09` request paths plus the existing local blank-id validation.
